data.name: SoleDrop-Exfil-TrainingData-ModelWeights
data.description: Bulk exfiltration of SoleDrop proprietary data: >=10 pulls to training-data/model-weights/customer-export endpoints OR >=5MB aggregate response from one source in the window. MITRE T1020 / T1213 / T1530; ATLAS AML.T0024 / AML.T0044. Source: Cloudflare HTTP Requests (class_uid=4002).

scheduledParams.query: dataSource.name='Cloudflare' dataSource.cloudflare_dataset='HTTP Requests' http_request.url.hostname contains '.lab.soledrop.co' http_request.url.path=* | filter (http_request.url.path in ('/api/v1/training-data','/api/v1/models','/api/v1/customers/export','/api/v1/users','/api/v1/billing','/api/v1/tenants') OR http_request.url.url_string matches '(?i)(include_weights=true|export=true|format=jsonl|limit=1000|/customers/export|/training-data)') | group pulls=count(), total_bytes=sum(number(http_response.body_length)), max_bytes=max(number(http_response.body_length)), endpoints=estimate_distinct(http_request.url.path), first_seen=oldest(timestamp), last_seen=newest(timestamp), ja3=any(tls.ja3_hash.value), ua=any(http_request.user_agent) by src_ip=src_endpoint.ip | filter pulls >= 10 OR total_bytes >= 5000000 | columns src_ip, pulls, total_bytes, max_bytes, endpoints, ja3, ua, first_seen, last_seen | sort -total_bytes | limit 100
